A.error_quality: free - throws Error with descriptive messages; no error needed to drive a fix (pass@1).
A.notes: Invariant enforcement = AI hand-written defensive checks. No type/contract mechanism. Private #balance; a #assertPositiveInteger helper throws before any mutation (Number.isInteger + <=0), and withdraw throws 'insufficient funds' before mutating. Check-before-mutate ordering keeps balance always >=0 and unchanged on error.
A.toolchain_notes: docker run --rm -v <repo>:/bench -w .../JavaScript/A ai-lang-bench node run_tests.js ; node v22.22.3.
